headline: Ooma (OOMA) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
summary: Ooma (OOMA) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +9.96% and +1.67%, respectively, for the quarter ended April 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Ciena vs. Coherent: Which Optical Networking Stock is the Better Bet?
summary: CIEN posts record $1.43B Q1 and $7B backlog while COHR ramps 800G/1.6T and CPO with NVIDIA.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Ciena, Raises Price Target to $660
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Tal Liani   maintains Ciena (NYSE:CIEN) with a Buy and raises the price target from $550 to $660.

headline: BofA raises Cisco, Ciena targets as AI optics boom accelerates
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America analysts have raised their price targets for Cisco Systems and Ciena, citing surging demand for high-speed optical networking equipment driven by artificial intelligence infrastructure expansion.
